Explanation: The player must have turned professional between 1995 and 2006, have over 300 centuries, and more than 3 official maximum breaks as of January 2025. Mark Selby turned professional in 1999, has compiled more than 800 century breaks, and has 6 official maximums [55516]. Mark Williams, though prolific, only has 3 maximum breaks [4975], and Ding Junhui, while having 7 maximums and turning pro in 2003, does not fit the match sequence as precisely as Selby. The evidence and peer consensus align on Selby.
Exact Answer: Mark Selby
Confidence: 95%
